---
title: "Histopathology Integration Processing"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(DropletUtils)
library(anndataR)
library(scuttle)
library(jsonlite)
library(fs)
library(glue)
library(tidyverse)

raw_dir   <- path_abs("../raw/GSE250521_RAW")
data_dir  <- path_abs("../data")
stage_dir <- path(data_dir, ".staging")
dir_create(c(data_dir, stage_dir))
```

```{r}
parse_meta <- function(modality) {
  dir_ls(raw_dir, regexp = glue("_{modality}_matrix")) |>
    path_file() |>
    str_match(glue("^(GSM[0-9]+)_([^_]+)_{modality}")) |>
    as_tibble(.name_repair = "minimal") |>
    set_names(c("match", "gsm", "sample_id")) |>
    select(-match)
}

visium_meta <- parse_meta("visium")
sc_meta     <- parse_meta("sc")
```

```{r}
gunzip_bytes <- function(path) {
  con <- gzcon(file(path, open = "rb"))
  on.exit(close(con))
  readBin(con, "raw", 50e6)
}

gunzip_to <- function(src, dest) writeBin(gunzip_bytes(src), dest)

stage_expr <- function(gsm, sample_id, modality) {
  prefix <- glue("{gsm}_{sample_id}_{modality}")
  dest   <- dir_create(path(stage_dir, prefix))
  walk(c("barcodes.tsv.gz", "features.tsv.gz", "matrix.mtx.gz"), \(f) {
    d <- path(dest, f)
    if (!file_exists(d)) link_create(path(raw_dir, glue("{prefix}_{f}")), d)
  })
  dest
}

qc_filter <- function(x, min_features = 200, min_counts = 1000,
                      max_mito = 0.20, min_cells = 3) {
  qc   <- perCellQCMetrics(x, subsets = list(mito = grepl("^MT-", rownames(x))))
  keep <- qc$detected >= min_features &
          qc$sum >= min_counts &
          qc$subsets_mito_percent <= max_mito * 100
  x    <- x[, keep]
  x[rowSums(counts(x) > 0) >= min_cells, ]
}
```

```{r}
read_visium <- function(gsm, sample_id) {
  prefix <- path(raw_dir, glue("{gsm}_{sample_id}_visium"))

  sce <- read10xCounts(
    stage_expr(gsm, sample_id, "visium"),
    col.names = TRUE, sample.names = sample_id
  )

  positions <- read.csv(
    glue("{prefix}_tissue_positions_list.csv.gz"),
    header = FALSE,
    col.names = c("barcode", "in_tissue", "array_row", "array_col", "pxl_row", "pxl_col")
  )
  in_tissue <- filter(positions, in_tissue == 1, barcode %in% colnames(sce))
  sce <- sce[, in_tissue$barcode]

  sf <- fromJSON(rawToChar(gunzip_bytes(glue("{prefix}_scalefactors_json.json.gz"))))

  img_path <- path(stage_dir, glue("{gsm}_{sample_id}"), "tissue_hires_image.png")
  if (!file_exists(img_path)) {
    dir_create(path_dir(img_path))
    gunzip_to(glue("{prefix}_tissue_hires_image.png.gz"), img_path)
  }

  coords <- `rownames<-`(
    as.matrix(in_tissue[, c("pxl_col", "pxl_row")]),
    in_tissue$barcode
  )
  spe <- SpatialExperiment(
    assays        = list(counts = counts(sce)),
    rowData       = rowData(sce),
    colData       = colData(sce),
    spatialCoords = coords,
    sample_id     = sample_id
  )
  addImg(spe,
    imageSource = as.character(img_path),
    scaleFactor = sf$tissue_hires_scalef,
    sample_id   = sample_id,
    image_id    = "hires",
    load        = TRUE
  )
}

read_visium(visium_meta$gsm[1], visium_meta$sample_id[1])
visium_list <- pmap(visium_meta, \(gsm, sample_id) {
  read_visium(gsm, sample_id) |> qc_filter()
}) |> set_names(visium_meta$sample_id)
```

```{r}
sc_list <- pmap(sc_meta, \(gsm, sample_id) {
  read10xCounts(
    stage_expr(gsm, sample_id, "sc"),
    col.names = TRUE, sample.names = sample_id
  ) |> qc_filter()
}) |> set_names(sc_meta$sample_id)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(visium_list, path(data_dir, "visium_spe_list.rds"))
saveRDS(sc_list,     path(data_dir, "sc_sce_list.rds"))
```

```{r}
h5ad_dir <- path(data_dir, "h5ad")
dir_create(h5ad_dir)

write_as_h5ad <- function(x, name) {
  if (is(x, "SpatialExperiment")) {
    reducedDim(x, "spatial") <- spatialCoords(x)
  }
  write_h5ad(x, h5ad_dir / glue("{name}.h5ad"), mode = "w")
}

all_list <- c(
  set_names(visium_list, glue("visium_{names(visium_list)}")),
  set_names(sc_list,     glue("sc_{names(sc_list)}"))
)
iwalk(all_list, write_as_h5ad)
```
